CREATE TABLE test_table (value String, scale UInt8);
SELECT toDecimal256OrZero(value, scale) AS result FROM test_table;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT toDecimal256OrZero(value, 2) AS converted FROM test_table WHERE value NOT LIKE '%Inf%');
SELECT toDecimal256OrZero(value, 10) AS decimal_value FROM test_table WHERE scale < 10;
SELECT t1.value, toDecimal256OrZero(t1.value, t1.scale) AS converted FROM test_table AS t1 JOIN (SELECT value, scale FROM test_table WHERE scale >= 0) AS t2 ON t1.scale = t2.scale;
WITH (SELECT toDecimal256OrZero(toString('0.99999999999999'), 10)) AS decimal_val SELECT decimal_val, toTypeName(decimal_val);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT value, toDecimal256OrZero(value, 2) AS converted FROM test_table UNION ALL SELECT '0', 2) AS results;
